subject: 🟢 ICMR - Indian Council of Medical Research: Online applications are invited to fill various Administrati
text:
🔔 ICMR - Indian Council of Medical Research

🟢 [Application window OPEN] Online applications are invited to fill various Administration Posts at ICMR-NIHR, Bhubaneshwar, (Detailed Advertisement available at https://www.aiimsexams.ac.in) (Last Date: July 03, 2026)
   👉 https://www.icmr.gov.in/post/online-applications-are-invited-to-fill-various-administration-posts-at-icmr-nihr-bhubaneshwar-detailed-advertisement-available-at-https-www-aiimsexams-ac-in-last-date-july-03-2026

📅 [Deadline / last date] Advt.No.lCMR/DIR(Sc-H)/NIOH-NGP/01/2026- Pers. for the post of Director, National Institute of One Health, Nagpur (Registrations for the post of Director, NIOH, Nagpur will start soon.) (Last Date: Ju
   👉 https://www.icmr.gov.in/post/advt-no-lcmr-dir-sc-h-nioh-ngp-01-2026-pers-for-the-post-of-director-national-institute-of-one-health-nagpur-registrations-for-the-post-of-director-nioh-nagpur-will-start-soon-last-date-july-20-2026

Source page: https://www.icmr.gov.in/
html:
🔔 ICMR - Indian Council of Medical Research

TypeUpdateLink

📅 Deadline / last dateAdvt.No.lCMR/DIR(Sc-H)/NIOH-NGP/01/2026- Pers. for the post of Director, National Institute of One Health, Nagpur (Registrations for the post of Director, NIOH, Nagpur will start soon.) (Last Date: July 20, 2026)Open ➜
